full_text:
Pick-seq Protocol

Start with wiping the bench and all surfaces with RNase AWAY.

Use one slide for normal t-CyCIF and one adjacent slide for mRNA extraction. Another adjacent slide is prepared for backup.

Finish all cycles of normal t-CyCIF first and stitch all images. Based on these images, select all ROIs and save them.

Below are the steps for mRNA extraction in adjacent slides.

Day 1 (approx. 1.5 h)

Dewaxing (approx. 1 h)

Deparaffinization + rehydration: Add 1 μl RNasin / 40 ml ethanol (0.0025%)

Falcon tubes (50 ml) can be used for one or two slides.

3 x 5 min Xylene

1 x 3 min 100% ethanol

1 x 3 min 90% ethanol

1 x 3 min 70% ethanol

1 x 3 min 30% ethanol

1 x 3 min PBS

NOTE: No Antigen Retrieval. No heating or bleaching.

Blocking (approx. 15 min)

Odyssey Buffer

Prepare a moist incubation chamber. Dry the surroundings of the tissue section. Without letting the tissue dry, quickly add 300 μl Odyssey blocking buffer with 0.3 μl RNasin (0.1%) per section and incubate for 10 min RT. Remember to wash the tube with DEPC water first before using it for a buffer mix.

Wash with 1x PBS (40 ml) with 0.0025% RNasin (1 μl), 3 min.

Staining (approx. 15 min)

Stain with pre-conjugated antibodies and Hoechst with 0.1% RNasin (0.3 μl) at +4°C overnight. IBA1-488, PanCK-555, CD45-647, Hoechst.

Day 2 (approx. 6 h)

mROI retrieval

Wash with 1x PBS (40ml) with 0.0025% RNasin (1 μl), 5 min.

Mounting with 50 μl 50% glycerol.

Scan all slides using 10X magnification.

In Tissue Resμlts, choose all ROIs for these slides based on pre-selected ROIs in adjacent t-CyCIF slides. Save these ROIs in the Tissue Resμlts system.

Decoverslip using a sterile 1x PBS and wash in another tube of PBS for 3 min.

The slides are loaded into the CyteFinder Instrument and retrieved using the integrated CytePicker modμle with 40 μm diameter needles.

Each retrieved tissue mROI is deposited with 0.15 μl RNase-free PBS into RNase-free PCR tubes containing lysis buffer:

For 5 picks:

For 10 picks:

Day 3 (approx. 2 h)

RNA extraction

Lyse material to release RNA

PCR tubes containing tissue microregions in the lysis buffer are removed from the freezer, allowed to thaw at RT for 5 minutes, and incubated at 56°C for 1 hour. Tubes are briefly vortexed, spun down, and placed on ice.

Beads preparation

Warm the original NorthernMax buffer (10×) to well mix, and then make a new 2× NorthernMax buffer in a 10 ml falcon tube.

Resuspend the Dynabeads Oligo (dT) 25 beads (Thermo Fisher) in the vial (vortex for >30 sec, or tilt and rotate for 5 min).

Transfer 120 μl (for 6 samples) of beads to a 1.5ml Eppendorf tube.

Wash the beads three times with 1 ml ice-cold 1× hybridization buffer Perform 1 min wash, following 1 min on the magnet, and remove the buffer. Repeat three times.

Note: Make a mix for 5 ml, and leave 2 ml for the following step 5.4.

Resuspend in original bead volume (20 μl each) with 120 μl ice-cold 2× hybridization buffer.

mRNA capture

20 μl of washed beads are added to each lysed sample, mixed by pipette, and incubated at 56°C for 1 minute, followed by room temperature incubation for 10 minutes. To avoid precipitation of magnetic beads, keep the tube horizontally and turn it over regμlarly.

Samples are placed on a magnet for 2 min. Remove all supernatants. Now all mRNA shoμld be combined and captured by the beads.

Wash Beads with mRNA

Wash the beads twice with 150 μl ice-cold 1× hybridization buffer. First, wash for 1 minute, then put the PCR tube on the magnet for 1 minute and remove all supernatants. Repeat it.

Wash the beads once with 150 μl ice-cold 1× PBS with 0.0025% RNasin Plus. Wash for 1 min, on magnet for 1 min, and remove all supernatants.

Elute RNA

All the pellets are resuspended in 5 μl nuclease-free water. Samples are incubated at 80°C for 2 minutes and immediately placed on a magnet.

Day 4 (approx. 6 h)

Reverse Transcription

Mμltiplexed Target Enrichment (MTE)

Day 5 (approx. 4 h)

qPCR

Tween 20 | 0.1% | 0.12 μl
RNasin Plus (10% in DEPC water) | 0.01% | 0.12 μl
